name: Harvard Business School
description: The world's most prestigious business school, known for its case method teaching and unparalleled alumni network. Located in Boston, HBS produces global business leaders across every industry.
description_cn: 全球最负盛名的商学院，以案例教学法和无与伦比的校友网络著称。位于波士顿的哈佛商学院培养了各行业的全球商业领袖。

name: Wharton School (UPenn)
name_cn: 宾夕法尼亚大学沃顿商学院
description: The world's leading finance school, Wharton offers the most rigorous quantitative curriculum in business education. Its undergraduate program is one of the most selective in the US.
description_cn: 全球顶尖金融学院，沃顿提供最严格的定量课程。其本科项目是美国竞争最激烈的商科项目之一。

name: Stanford Graduate School of Business
description: The most selective business school in the world, Stanford GSB sits at the heart of Silicon Valley. Famous for shaping tech entrepreneurs and social innovators.
description_cn: 全球录取率最低的商学院，斯坦福商学院坐落于硅谷腹地，以培养科技创业者和社会创新者闻名。

name: MIT Sloan School of Management
name_cn: 麻省理工斯隆管理学院
description: Known for its STEM-heavy approach to management education, MIT Sloan combines rigorous analytics with real-world application. Home to the MIT Finance Lab and cutting-edge research.
description_cn: 以STEM导向的管理教育著称，麻省理工斯隆将严格的数据分析与实际应用相结合，拥有MIT金融实验室等顶尖研究机构。

name: Columbia Business School
description: Located in New York City, Columbia Business School has unmatched access to Wall Street. Warren Buffett studied under Benjamin Graham here. The Value Investing program is legendary.
description_cn: 位于纽约的哥伦比亚商学院拥有无与伦比的华尔街资源，沃伦·巴菲特曾在此师从本杰明·格雷厄姆，价值投资课程享誉全球。

name: Booth School of Business (UChicago)
name_cn: 芝加哥大学布斯商学院
description: Home to more Nobel laureates in Economics than any other institution, Booth is renowned for rigorous financial theory and the Fama-French factor models. Flexible curriculum is a hallmark.
description_cn: 拥有最多诺贝尔经济学奖得主的商学院，布斯以严格的金融理论和法马-弗伦奇因子模型闻名，灵活的课程设置是其一大特色。

name: Kellogg School of Management (Northwestern)
name_cn: 西北大学凯洛格管理学院
description: Ranked #1 for Marketing globally, Kellogg is known for its collaborative culture, strong consulting placements, and leadership development programs.
description_cn: 全球市场营销排名第一，凯洛格以协作文化、强大的咨询就业和领导力发展项目著称。

name: Haas School of Business (UC Berkeley)
name_cn: 加州大学伯克利分校哈斯商学院
description: As the only top business school within a public research university at its caliber, Haas offers outstanding value. Its MFE (Master of Financial Engineering) is ranked #1 globally.
description_cn: 唯一跻身顶尖行列的公立商学院，哈斯具有极高的性价比。其金融工程硕士（MFE）项目全球排名第一。

name: Tuck School of Business (Dartmouth)
description: Known for its tight-knit community and exceptional alumni engagement, Tuck is MBA-only. Its intimate campus fosters deep relationships and unparalleled peer learning.
description_cn: 以紧密的社区氛围和出色的校友互动著称，塔克是纯MBA项目。小而精的校园培养了深厚的人际关系和无与伦比的同伴学习体验。

name: Ross School of Business (University of Michigan)
name_cn: 密歇根大学罗斯商学院
description: One of the best public business schools, Ross offers top-ranked programs in Accounting and Finance. Its MAP (Multidisciplinary Action Project) provides real consulting experience.
description_cn: 顶尖公立商学院之一，罗斯在会计和金融领域享有极高声誉。其多学科行动项目（MAP）为学生提供真实的咨询项目经验。

name: London Business School
description: Europe's #1 business school, LBS sits in the heart of London's financial district. With 65+ nationalities in each cohort, it offers the most international MBA experience in the world.
description_cn: 欧洲排名第一的商学院，伦敦商学院坐落于伦敦金融城，每届学员来自65+国家，提供全球最国际化的MBA体验。

name: Oxford Said Business School
description: Part of the University of Oxford, one of the world's oldest universities. The 1+1 MBA pairs with an Oxford master's degree. Its 800-year academic tradition creates unparalleled intellectual depth.
description_cn: 隶属于拥有800年历史的牛津大学，1+1 MBA项目可与牛津其他硕士学位相结合，深厚的学术传统创造了无与伦比的思想深度。

name: Cambridge Judge Business School
description: Backed by one of the world's greatest research universities, Cambridge Judge is rapidly climbing global rankings. Its MFin program is among the best in Europe.
description_cn: 依托全球顶尖研究型大学，剑桥贾奇商学院在全球排名快速攀升，其金融硕士项目跻身欧洲最佳之列。

name: Imperial College Business School
description: A STEM-oriented business school in central London. Its MSc Finance program attracts top quantitative talent. Strong links with London's fintech ecosystem.
description_cn: 位于伦敦市中心的理工导向商学院，金融硕士项目吸引顶尖量化人才，与伦敦金融科技生态系统联系紧密。

name: Warwick Business School
description: Warwick Business School is the largest business school in the UK. Known for world-leading Finance and Accounting programs and a strong undergraduate track.
description_cn: 英国规模最大的商学院，以世界领先的金融和会计项目及强大的本科课程著称。

name: Rotman School of Management (University of Toronto)
name_cn: 多伦多大学罗特曼管理学院
description: Canada's top-ranked business school, located in the heart of Toronto's financial district. Roger Martin's integrative thinking methodology revolutionized modern business education.
description_cn: 加拿大排名第一的商学院，位于多伦多金融区核心地带。罗杰·马丁的整合性思维方法论彻底改革了现代商业教育。

name: Ivey Business School (Western University)
name_cn: 西安大略大学艾维商学院
description: Canada's premier case-method business school. The 2-year HBA undergraduate program is one of North America's most respected business degrees.
description_cn: 加拿大最顶尖的案例教学商学院，两年制HBA本科项目是北美最受尊敬的商科学位之一。

name: Schulich School of Business (York University)
name_cn: 约克大学舒利克商学院
description: Named after Canadian mining magnate Seymour Schulich, this Toronto school is known for exceptional diversity and its international MBA (IMBA) program.
description_cn: 以加拿大矿业大亨西摩·舒利克命名，这所多伦多商学院以卓越的多元化和国际MBA项目著称。

name: Desautels Faculty of Management (McGill University)
name_cn: 麦吉尔大学德萨泰斯管理学院
description: Located in Montreal, one of the world's best cities for students. McGill's BCom is the most selective undergraduate business degree in Quebec.
description_cn: 位于蒙特利尔——全球最佳学生城市之一。麦吉尔大学本科商学学位是魁北克竞争最激烈的商科项目。

name: UBC Sauder School of Business
name_cn: 不列颠哥伦比亚大学商学院
description: On the Pacific coast, UBC Sauder benefits from proximity to Asia-Pacific markets. Its real estate division and finance programs are among Canada's best.
description_cn: 位于太平洋海岸，毗邻亚太市场。其房地产和金融项目跻身加拿大最佳行列，亚裔学生比例高，中文环境友好。

name: HKU Business School
description: Asia's leading business school, HKU Business School combines British academic tradition with deep Chinese market knowledge. Its location in Hong Kong provides unmatched finance industry access.
description_cn: 亚洲顶尖商学院，香港大学经管学院融合英国学术传统与深厚的中国市场知识，香港的地理位置提供了无与伦比的金融业资源。

name: HKUST Business School
description: Consistently ranked among Asia's top business schools, HKUST's MBA is FT-ranked in the global top 30. Its quantitative finance programs attract top talent from mainland China.
description_cn: 长期跻身亚洲顶尖商学院，香港科大MBA获《金融时报》全球前30排名，量化金融项目吸引大量来自中国内地的顶尖人才。

name: CUHK Business School
description: CUHK Business School has the largest alumni network in Hong Kong. It partners with leading Chinese institutions and offers dual-degree programs with top mainland universities.
description_cn: 香港中文大学商学院拥有香港最大的校友网络，与国内顶尖高校合作，提供双学位项目，粤语和普通话双语环境。

name: Lingnan University
description: Hong Kong's liberal arts university, Lingnan provides a unique small-class environment. Good entry point for students targeting Hong Kong's finance industry with slightly lower admission requirements.
description_cn: 香港博雅大学，岭南提供独特的小班教学环境，是入读门槛相对较低、目标进入香港金融业学生的理想选择。

name: Tsinghua School of Economics and Management
name_cn: 清华大学经济管理学院
description: China's #1 business school, SEM Tsinghua combines China's top engineering university with world-class management education. Its EMBA program is the most prestigious in China.
description_cn: 中国排名第一的商学院，依托中国顶尖理工大学的资源，提供世界级管理教育。其EMBA项目是中国最负盛名的高管教育项目。

name: Guanghua School of Management (PKU)
name_cn: 北京大学光华管理学院
description: China's second top business school backed by Peking University. Guanghua is particularly strong in Finance and Accounting research, with close ties to China's policymaking circles.
description_cn: 依托北京大学的中国第二顶尖商学院，光华在金融和会计研究领域尤为出色，与中国政策圈联系紧密。

name: School of Management (Fudan University)
description: Shanghai's top business school, Fudan Management benefits from the city's status as China's financial capital. Strong in Marketing and Strategy, with growing international partnerships.
description_cn: 上海顶尖商学院，依托上海中国金融中心地位，营销和战略实力雄厚，国际合作伙伴不断增多。

name: Antai College of Economics and Management (SJTU)
name_cn: 上海交通大学安泰经济与管理学院
description: SJTU Antai combines China's MIT (SJTU) with comprehensive management programs. Its AACSB-accredited MBA emphasizes quantitative methods and China business strategy.
description_cn: 依托"中国麻省理工"上海交大，安泰学院提供全面的管理项目，获AACSB认证的MBA强调定量方法和中国商业战略。

name: CEIBS (China Europe International Business School)
description: Asia's #1 business school (FT 2024), CEIBS is unique as a joint venture between China and the EU. It offers the best MBA for those who want China expertise with a global perspective.
description_cn: 亚洲排名第一的商学院（FT 2024），中欧国际工商学院是中欧合资的独特机构，为希望兼具中国经验与全球视野的学员提供最佳MBA项目。

name: Melbourne Business School
description: Australia's premier business school, part of the University of Melbourne. Its MBA is consistently ranked among the Pacific Rim's best, with strong connections to Australian and Asian business.
description_cn: 澳大利亚顶尖商学院，隶属墨尔本大学，MBA持续跻身环太平洋地区最佳，与澳洲和亚洲商界联系紧密。

name: AGSM Business School (UNSW Sydney)
name_cn: 新南威尔士大学澳大利亚管理学院
description: UNSW's AGSM is Sydney's top-ranked business school. Located near Australia's financial hub, it offers strong finance and accounting programs with excellent industry connections.
description_cn: 新南威尔士大学旗下的澳大利亚管理学院是悉尼排名最高的商学院，毗邻澳洲金融中心，金融和会计项目强劲，行业联系出色。

name: Monash Business School
description: One of Australia's largest and most international universities, Monash Business School attracts a highly diverse student body. Strong in Finance and Economics research.
description_cn: 澳大利亚规模最大、最国际化的大学之一，莫纳什商学院吸引高度多元化的学生群体，在金融和经济学研究领域实力强劲。

name: NUS Business School
name_cn: 新加坡国立大学商学院
description: Asia's #2 business school (QS 2024), NUS Business School is Singapore's most selective. Gateway to Southeast Asian business with strong connections to global MNCs and financial institutions.
description_cn: 亚洲排名第二的商学院（QS 2024），新加坡国立大学商学院是新加坡录取门槛最高的商学院，是进入东南亚市场的门户，与全球跨国公司和金融机构联系紧密。

name: Nanyang Business School (NTU)
description: NTU's Nanyang Business School is consistently ranked in Asia's top 5. Known for analytics integration across all programs. STEM-oriented business education in a highly international environment.
description_cn: 南洋商学院长期跻身亚洲前五，以跨项目的数据分析整合著称，在高度国际化的环境中提供STEM导向的商业教育。

name: INSEAD (Asia Campus)
name_cn: 欧洲工商管理学院（亚洲校区）
description: The 'Business School for the World', INSEAD's 10-month MBA runs across Singapore and Fontainebleau (France). Unparalleled international exposure with 95+ nationalities per class.
description_cn: "世界的商学院"，INSEAD的10个月MBA项目贯穿新加坡和法国枫丹白露校区，每届学员涵盖95+国籍，国际化程度无与伦比。
